productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Scullers Top Purple Tops
description: Composition Purple polo neck top made of 100% viscose, has short puff sleeves with elasticated cuff, and short buttoned placket with ruffles around it Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print A feminine top with a formal twist, this purple polo neck top from scullers is a must-have in your wardrobe if you want to look pretty and in control at the same time. The girly ruffles and puff sleeves blend it perfectly with the formal-looking collar. Pair it with jeans and ballerinas for a great ensemble. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33"
